title: Upon His Departure Hence.
content:
Thus I
    Pass by,
    And die:
    As one
    Unknown
    And gone:
    I'm made
    A shade,
    And laid
    I' th' grave:
    There have
    My cave,
    Where tell
    I dwell.
    Farewell.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon His Departure Hence.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
